titleStmt.title: SII 30.178: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 178. (A.R. No. 256 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the east wall of the maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḻa II: year 15: 1067 A.D.

summary.p: A portion of the inscription is lost during the renovation of the temple. Begins with the prasaśti, tirumagaḷ maruviya etc., of the king. Registers the sale of land to the temple of Rudrasōlai mahādēva situated on the southern bank of Vehkā at Parākramasōḻa-chaturvēḍimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu, a sub-division of Dāmar-Kōṭṭam by the assembly of Veṅkuḷattūr alias Paramēsvara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaḻumala-nāḍu, a sub division of Kāliyūrk-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ maruviya ceṅkol ven=tan tiruttamaiyano ṭum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakka(ṇa)mum koṇṭu
kollāpurattu jayastampam nāṭṭi Etiramarpeṟātu koppattu Āhavamallaṉai yaruñceṉaiyu māṉaiyum kutiraiyumkoṇṭu vijaiyā
bhiṣekam cey
tu virasimhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājendradevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 tāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūrkkoṭṭattu kaḻumalanāṭṭu veṇkuḷattūrākiya ci parameśvaraccaturvetimaṅkalattu mahāsa
tte kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟa kūṭiyiruntu Immaṇṭalattu tāmark koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻa caturveti maṅkalattu tiruvekkā
m ruttira colai mahātevarkku Ātitāsacaṇṭeśvaratevarpakkal koṇṭakācu muppatuṅ koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta
ta ceyitu Eṅka pāṭakattuccanṉayak kiramavittaṉ nilattukku kiḻakku meṟku nokkippona vati [maṅkalat ]
karaikku vaṭakku I nilattu niṉṟa payan maraṅkaḷumerikaraikku kiḻakku paṭāttu tiruveṅkaṭakirama
vittaṉum śrīvaikuntattu tevar nilattukkum koṭṭukkālukkut teṟkum vāttutecukecuvakkiramavittaṉum
Inta vāykkālukku vaṭakku Irāyūr cāmuṇṭak kiramavittaṉum muṟuppuṭṭur kūḷacanma nilattukkuṅ kālukkuṅ
karaikku meṟku Uṟuppuṭṭur kāḷeru vār nilamaṭaṅkal In nānkellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilamikutikku
vāykkuḻiyuyitu kuḷḷavayku nāṅkaḷum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttomirukālāvatu mukkālavatum
tāmar nāṭṭup parāk coḻacca maṅkalattu tiruve
tenkarai tiruve mahāte titāsasaṇḍeśvararkku nāṅ
kaḷ viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom Innilattukku vilai dravyam
yittu Iṟai dravya muṭpaṭṭa mirupatiṉ Āka Āciru kalame
perpaṭṭa vilaiyuṅ koḷḷa kuṭuttomā lam Ipparicu viṟṟuk kuṭuttu
ti nāllāvatu Iṟai dravya dravya maṟa Innilattukku Ituve vilai
ṟuti poruṭcelavolai Ituveyā Innilattukku Ituve vilai
vin nilattukku ciṟukuṭikaḷ taraṇi nākaṉe koṇṭu vilaik kaṟa viṟṟuk kuṭuttu
yuṅ koḷḷavum Aṭṭavum peṟāte tāmākavum kallilum cempilum ve
tākavum Ipparicu Iṟaiyāva niṉṟu veṅkaṭak kiramavitta
veṅkaṭakkiramavittaṉum Irāyur vi ttaṉum paṇippaṇiyāl
ṟuk kuṭuttom tāmark koṭṭattu tāmaṟ kkirama coḻac caturveti
vakkāviṉ teṉkarai Uruda colai cāritāsan caḷe
cāllappaṭṭa veṇkuḷattūr mahāsa sabhaiyuṇinṟu paṇikeṭ�
vum sabhaiyuḷḷeḻu cantiracekaranen neḻuttu Innilattukku
vukaḷil pāccavum neṟkkūli peṟuvatāka tu kiṇaṟuḷḷaḷa
ya vatākavum Ippari� viṟṟu tu mahāsabhaiyom
tu cantiracekaranen n tu Ipparicu viṟṟu
m pāṭakattuk kāmakko rākkirama Ivai En
Digital edition of SII 30.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
